goal: Replace subagent-based context relay with an external bash loop that starts fresh interactive claude sessions, making relay mechanical and visible

steps.note: As planned. Includes set -euo pipefail, ABOUTME, usage message, file-existence guard, jq guard, jq exit-code check, claude exit-code check (warn + break), post-loop recheck. Prompt is minimal — no CONTEXT LOW instructions.
Jeff reviewed. Approved — 'looks right; we can test it as we go.'

As planned. Removed relay number, soft limit, and subagent spawn (old steps 3-5). Protocol is now: finish step → write detailed note → stop. References bash/relay-loop.sh as the external mechanism. Title changed from 'Context Relay Handoff Protocol' to 'Context-Low Protocol'.
As planned. Changed 'execute the relay handoff protocol' to 'follow the context-low protocol'. Hook mechanism untouched.

steps.action: Update the Context Relay section in docs/architecture/workflows.md.
steps.note: As planned. Removed 'Designed for AFK operation'. Replaced subagent flow with loop-based flow. Updated key components: added relay-loop.sh, updated context-relay.md description, replaced 'relay number + soft limit' with 'safety cap: max iterations'. Updated File Layout table with relay-loop.sh entry and new context-relay.md description.

steps.action: Spawn jeff-js-reviewer and code-simplicity-reviewer on staged changes. Fix blocking issues.
steps.note: Two fixes: (1) $? capture bug — claude exit code was overwritten before echo; now captured into exit_code variable first. (2) Removed redundant post-loop remaining check — dead logic since the for-loop only exhausts when remaining was never 0. Also fixed ABOUTME line 3 wording per JS reviewer.

steps.action: git add bash/relay-loop.sh .claude/tasks/context-relay.md .claude/hooks/relay-on-context-low.sh docs/architecture/workflows.md. Commit with message describing the replacement of subagent relay with external loop. Use commit-changes.md format.

verification: bash/relay-loop.sh exists with set -euo pipefail, jq guard, file-existence guard, jq exit-code check, claude exit-code check
relay-loop.sh prompt does NOT contain CONTEXT LOW instructions (context-relay.md owns that)
context-relay.md contains no references to subagents, spawning, or relay numbers
relay-on-context-low.sh hook mechanism unchanged (atomic mv, exit 2), only message text updated
workflows.md Context Relay section describes loop-based flow, not subagent flow; no 'AFK' framing
workflows.md File Layout table includes bash/relay-loop.sh
